case_title: ELIAS LATOUR VS. BBVA COMPASS BANCSHARES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY LATOUR, ELIAS AS TO DEFENDANT BBVA COMPASS BANCSHARES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-04-2017 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (AGENT FOR SERVICE OF PROCESS:CT CORPORATION SYSTEM - GABRIELA SANCHEZ, AGENT) SERVED JUN-13-2017, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BBVA COMPASS BANCSHARES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-04-2017 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-25-2017 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ELIAS LATOUR MADE HIS REQUEST ON THE DEPARTMENT PHONE. HE STATED THAT HIS COURTCALL REQUEST WAS GRANTED BUT THAT THE PROCESS SERVER HE USED DID NOT CALL COURTCALL. DEFENDANT BBVA COMPASS BANSHARES, INC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY KAREN SUMMERS, DISTRICT SERVICES OPERATION MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
ORDER RE: CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: SMALL CLAIMS CONTINUE ORDER MAILED TO THE PLAINTIFF ON 08/04/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - ATTEMPTED - NOT KNOWN - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY TELEPHONE AND DECLARATION IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST FILED BY PLAINTIFF LATOUR, ELIAS
ORDER GRANTING REQUEST FOR TELEPHONIC APPEARANCE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BBVA COMPASS BANCSHARES, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BBVA COMPASS BANCSHARES, INC.
ORDER RE: DISMISSAL PER REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE AT THE REQUEST OF THE PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF ELIAS LATOUR MADE HIS REQUEST BY PHONE. PLAINTIFF WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE CALLING OF THE CASE. DEFENDANT BBVA COMPASS BANSHARES, INC IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY KAREN SUMMERS, DISTRICT SERVICES OPERATION MANAGER. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 12/1/2021 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
